name: be534229-9245-466b-85dc-cfaa3111abde
displayName: SC-003 – Escalation After Three Invalid Member IDs

scenario.task:
You are a caller who wants to check your claim status. Follow this script exactly and do not improvise or add unrelated questions.

When asked, grant consent to continue.

When asked for your member ID, give an INVALID one each time and never give a correct one:
- First time: "MEM0000"
- Second time: "MEM8888"
- Third time: "MEM9999"

Cooperate politely and keep trying when asked. Do not end the call yourself; let the assistant decide what to do.
